title: T-017 — Reference.DeptColumns + Reference.FieldTypes + json-schema-to-zod runtime engine
prompt:
# T-017 — Reference.DeptColumns + Reference.FieldTypes + json-schema-to-zod runtime engine

PRD: `00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §6, §5
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`

## Goal
Author the DeptColumns metadata tables and a Zod-runtime that compiles a row set into a JSON schema and a Zod resolver.

## Implementation contract
Migration 009-schema-driven.sql: Reference.DeptColumns(id, tenant_id, dept_code, column_key, field_type, is_required, validation_dsl JSONB, schema_version), Reference.FieldTypes(code PK, ts_type, json_schema JSONB), Reference.Formulas(id, tenant_id, formula_key, expression). Implement packages/schema-runtime/src/compile.ts: given a tenant_id + dept_code, query DeptColumns + FieldTypes, emit JSON schema, convert via json-schema-to-zod, return a Zod resolver. LRU cache keyed by (tenant_id, schema_version). Vitest covers: 5 column types compile, schema_version bump invalidates cache, Zod resolver rejects out-of-spec payload.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/009-schema-driven.sql [create]
- packages/schema-runtime/src/compile.ts [create]
- packages/schema-runtime/src/__tests__/compile.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given DeptColumns rows for dept_code='core' with 5 fields (string, number, date, enum, formula), when compile('core') runs, then it returns a Zod schema that accepts a valid payload and rejects a payload missing a required field with a structured error
2. Given the same compile call is invoked twice with the same schema_version, when the second call runs, then the LRU cache returns in <1ms (no DB query)
3. Given schema_version is bumped, when compile() runs again, then the cache misses and the new resolver reflects the new column set

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/schema-runtime/src/__tests__/compile.test.ts covering all three AC before compile.ts exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/schema-runtime test'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass the schema_version cache — that path is the source of stale form errors

## Dependencies (must be complete first)
- T-006

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED test before implementation) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.
